future_status_protocol: DSYSA has an official Field Status page and a lightning/cancellation protocol. Current visible text is policy-oriented, not a clear live open/closed feed. If DSYSA publishes clear per-field statuses, set poll_official_status to true only after parser tests.
agent_rule: Official source wins. Weather gives drive risk and game-time play probability. The DSYSA status page is an official protocol/source, but the current page must not be treated as a live open/closed feed until clear per-field statuses are available. Tell the user to check the official DSYSA source before leaving when official status is unknown.
